headline: Miami’s Tech Boom Is Minting Winners, and These 5 Stocks Are Cashing In
summary: Miami’s transformation into a legitimate tech hub has been one of the more consequential geographic shifts in American business over the past five years. Venture capital firms, hedge funds, crypto companies, and tech startups have relocated from San Francisco and New York, drawn by zero state income tax, a business-friendly regulatory environment, and a growing ... headline: Exxon Mobil Plans to Move Its Legal Home to Texas From New Jersey
summary: The company, incorporated in New Jersey since 1882, plans to ask shareholders to vote on a proposal to redomicile, as it joins other companies seeking a more business-friendly environment.

headline: Coinbase Stablecoin Insurance Deal Highlights Institutional Use And Valuation Debate
summary: Coinbase Global and Aon completed what they describe as the first known stablecoin insurance premium payment. The transaction used a regulated stablecoin provided by Paxos and settled across multiple blockchains. The deal links digital assets with traditional insurance services for an institutional use case. For Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN), this move sits alongside a share price of $199.79 and a mixed recent return profile. The stock is up 7.9% over the past week and 21.0% over the past...

headline: Circle’s 10% Gain Monday Outpaces MSTR and COIN in Big Day for Crypto Stocks
summary: Shares of Circle Internet Group (CRCL) closed up roughly 10% on Monday, with the stock sitting at $111.84 as of the close. That move puts CRCL well ahead of its crypto-adjacent peers today, outpacing both MicroStrategy (MSTR) and Coinbase (COIN) in a session where broader crypto sentiment got a modest lift from Bitcoin.
